order_reference.description: This value is used by Bolt as an external reference to a given order. This reference must be unique per successful transaction.

order_description.description: Used optionally to pass additional information like order numbers or other IDs as needed.

display_id.description: A shopper-facing identifier corresponding to the order reference associated with this transaction.

total.description: The total amount of the cart including its items and taxes (if applicable).
